lowering.python_source:
from monogate import BEST

def lowered_expr(x):
    """SuperBEST DAG-lowered expression; shared temporaries first."""
    _t3 = BEST.neg(x)
    _t2 = BEST.exp(_t3)
    _t1 = (1 + _t2)
    _t0 = BEST.div(1, _t1)
    return (_t0 + (_t0 * (1 - _t0)))

lowering.python_source:
from monogate import BEST

def lowered_expr(k1, k2, k3, q):
    """SuperBEST DAG-lowered expression; shared temporaries first."""
    _t5 = (k1 * q)
    _t6 = (k2 * q)
    _t7 = (k3 * q)
    _t2 = BEST.exp(_t5)
    _t3 = BEST.exp(_t6)
    _t4 = BEST.exp(_t7)
    _t1 = (_t2 + _t3)
    _t0 = (_t1 + _t4)
    return ((BEST.div(_t2, _t0) + BEST.div(_t3, _t0)) + BEST.div(_t4, _t0))
